_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-02 02:54:49Z)**_

The issue is that justfile doesn't allow extra indentation inside recipe bodies. The lines inside the `{ ... }` block have extra leading spaces. I need to flatten them to the recipe's indentation level.

```text
zoxide: detected a possible configuration issue.
Please ensure that zoxide is initialized right at the end of your shell configuration file (usually ~/.zshrc).

If the issue persists, consider filing an issue at:
https://github.com/ajeetdsouza/zoxide/issues

Disable this message by setting _ZO_DOCTOR=0.

Available recipes:
    default
    git-remote-set-origin owner repo            # just git-remote-set-origin daviddwlee84 myrepo
    git-remote-show                             # Show current git remotes.
    list
    ssh-add-key name=default_key_name           # just ssh-add-key id_ed25519_github
    ssh-agent-status
    ssh-comment name=default_key_name           # Show key comment from public key.
    ssh-config-append name=default_key_name host=default_host # just ssh-config-append id_ed25519_github github.com
    ssh-config-snippet name=default_key_name host=default_host # just ssh-config-snippet id_ed25519_github github.com
    ssh-debug-github host=default_host          # Show what SSH would actually use for this host.
    ssh-fingerprint name=default_key_name       # Print fingerprint of public key.
    ssh-gen name comment=default_comment        # just ssh-gen mykey "my-comment"
    ssh-gen-github name comment=default_comment # just ssh-gen-github trading-vm-david github-trading-vm-david
    ssh-list-files
    ssh-perms
    ssh-pub name=default_key_name               # Print public key only.
    ssh-setup-github name comment=default_comment host=default_host # just ssh-setup-github trading-vm-david github-trading-vm-david
    ssh-summary name=default_key_name host=default_host # Quick summary for a given key.
    ssh-test-github host=default_host           # Test GitHub SSH auth.
    ssh-which
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-02 02:55:16Z)**_

Fixed. The problem was that justfile doesn't allow extra indentation inside recipe bodies. I changed the `{ ... }` block in `ssh-config-append` to use line continuations (`\`) so all lines stay at the same indentation level.

---

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-04-02 02:58:44Z)**_

Added 6 new recipes under a "GitHub CLI key management" section:

| Recipe | Description |
|---|---|
| `gh-ssh-list` | List SSH keys on your GitHub account |
| `gh-ssh-add name title type` | Add a public key (defaults to your default key, `authentication` type) |
| `gh-ssh-delete id` | Delete an SSH key by ID |
| `gh-gpg-list` | List GPG keys on your GitHub account |
| `gh-gpg-add key_file title` | Add a GPG key from a file |
| `gh-gpg-delete id` | Delete a GPG key by ID |

Example usage:
```bash
just gh-ssh-list
just gh-ssh-add id_ed25519_github "My Laptop"
just gh-ssh-add id_ed25519_github "Signing Key" signing
```
